fieldDescription: Preserves the first use of a vanilla-style portrait. Later duplicate uses can be replaced.
Leaves factions not listed in Dynamic Portraits' factionRoles map unchanged. Recommended for mod-heavy games.
vanillaTopLevel counts portraits directly under graphics/portraits. allPortraits counts any eligible portrait path.
Fallback chance that an eligible duplicate is replaced when its role does not have a specific chance.
